growth.eyebrow: Our own marketing engine — as a product
growth.lede: We run our own user acquisition with agents across every major social channel. The same stack is available to clients — operators stand up a multi-channel campaign, agents ship creatives, schedule posts, A/B test copy and iterate without waiting on a human.
growth.c1.p: Image, short video, copy, hooks — generated, tested, re-cut on brief.
growth.c2.p: Cross-channel calendars, posted on schedule, retries on failure.
growth.c3.p: Agents handle inbound DMs, seed threads, escalate real intent to humans.
growth.c4.p: Per-channel CPA, per-variant lift, weekly auto-optimised plan.
growth.console.title: growth-console · 24h
